Container.Name: RustDrop
Container.Overview:
RustDrop is a self-hosted, lightweight file-sharing portal built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - Smooth drag-and-drop uploads for both files and directories. - Dynamic customizable file retention and total storage quotas. - Security locking using an access PIN. - Optional allowed file extensions filter.
Container.Requires: Ensure the Uploads Path volume has sufficient disk space for the expected file sizes.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database and config files.

Config.Name: Uploads Path
Config.Description: Directory where uploaded files are stored.

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional access PIN to lock the file portal. Leave empty for public mode.

Config.Name: Site Title
Config.Description: Custom site title rendered in the navigation header.

Config.Name: Max File Size
Config.Description: Maximum allowed single file upload size (in GB).

Config.Name: Max Storage Limit
Config.Description: Combined maximum total storage limit for all uploaded files (in GB).

Config.Name: Retention Period Days
Config.Description: Number of days to store uploaded files before automatically purging them.

Config.Name: Allowed Extensions
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions (e.g. pdf,png,zip). Leave empty to allow all.
